rationale: Accepted feedback is reflected in system docs and TASK-070. Docs preserve the key distinctions: claims coordinate intent, worktrees isolate filesystem state, validation isolates judgment, and SHAs identify exact Git commits. Roadmap acceptance covers metadata fields, graph visibility, backward compatibility, and tests; non-goals prevent one-worktree-per-claim, auto-spawn, and treating claim metadata as security truth.
checks: TASK-070 created with implementation acceptance and non-goals
